comment: Roles v1 (DESIGN_QUESTS §4, rung Q4): a role-filled errand. `hauler` is queried from the live world — candidates of kind npc, filtered by require (same region as the player), ranked by prefer (knows the hook fact), ties broken by id sort. In THIS world reed knows brook_slump, so hauler fills reed (its pair fixture role_fill_b flips the knower and fills wren — the SAME rules, a different world, a different NPC, deterministically: the §13 done-criterion). The objective and terminal gate on npc.$hauler.arrived — proving $role substitution resolves the binding into condition keys (npc.reed.arrived), which is also what puts that key in the seed index.

stages.journal: $hauler agreed to carry water from the spring.

objectives.text: Wait for $hauler to reach the far pool.

stages.journal: $hauler made it to the pool, and the water went with them.
